raw_consumer_statement: There were suspicious charges of my account that I was not aware of, and I contacted the credit card issue when I saw them on my statement. I left them know that those charges were not mine and they started a dispute. About a month later, I realized that they had only disputed one of the charges, not all of them as I requested, so I had to request that those charges were fraudulent and dispute them again. I had not had any contact from the credit card company and noticed those charges had been placed back on my account without me knowing so, and without anything and writing from them. They promised that they would contact me with the resolution on the dispute and let me know what it happened. Otherwise the charges would go away if I didnt hear from them again. Good thing I checked because they stuck them back on my account with interest.
